title: Branches
description: Veterinary clinic branches. Each branch has its own schedule, cash register, inventory and billing series.

plan_limit.max_sedes: You reached your plan's branch limit. Upgrade your plan to add more.

empty.no_records_description: Create your first branch to start setting up scheduling, cash and inventory.
empty.no_results_description: No record matches the current filters. Try adjusting the search or changing the status.

form.description_create: Register a new branch for the veterinary clinic.
form.description_edit: Update the information of the selected branch.
form.section_basic_hint_create: Main data that identifies the branch. The code is auto-assigned on creation (SEDE-NNN).
form.section_basic_hint_edit: Main data of the branch. The code was auto-assigned on creation.
form.section_billing_hint: Receipt series associated with this branch (SUNAT / Nubefact).

fields.serie_factura_hint: 4 SUNAT characters, no hyphen: F001 (not F-001). Must exist in Nubefact.
fields.serie_boleta_hint: 4 SUNAT characters, no hyphen: B001 (not B-001). Must exist in Nubefact.
fields.activa_hint: If disabled, the branch won't appear in scheduling, cash or selection lists.

delete.title: Delete branch
delete.description: You're about to delete branch {{name}} ({{code}}). This can be undone from the trash within 30 days.

bulk.delete_description: You're about to delete {{count}} selected branches. This can be undone from the trash within 30 days.
